body:
**<sub><sub>![P2 Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/P2-yellow?style=flat)</sub></sub>  Reconcile the configurator handoff state**

This new note correctly says PR #68 is open and should lead the next configurator session, but the same §3b subsection below still says there are “no open configurator PRs”/“No `area:configurator` issues open” and lists the old icon/side-effect themes first. Since `resume` explicitly reads §3b first, an agent resuming configurator work can follow the stale body and miss the open #68 review/verification path; update the subsection’s main state and candidate themes instead of only adding a prefatory note.

Useful? React with 👍 / 👎.
